headline: Honeywell Collaboration Puts AI Battery Manufacturing On Investors’ Watch List
summary: Honeywell International (NasdaqGS:HON) has entered a collaboration with FOM Technologies focused on AI-driven battery manufacturing automation. The partners plan to integrate Honeywell’s Battery Manufacturing Excellence Platform with FOM’s slot die coating at the new Alabama Mobility and Power Center. The initiative is intended to support research, pilot production, and workforce training for next generation battery technologies. For Honeywell, currently trading around $234.5, this move...
